shape: Host on which the BlueField is physically present but lspci -d 15b3: returns nothing. Most likely root cause: kernel module not loaded (host rebooted into a newer kernel that didn't get OFED rebuilt). Secondary candidates: device in wrong eswitch mode, BIOS PCIe slot disabled, firmware in flash-recovery state.
